title: viola obtusa var. glabra
intro: Viola obtusa var. glabra is a flowering plant that belongs to the violet family and is commonly known as the hairy-leaved pansy. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its content of saponins and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Viola obtusa var. glabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
